'''shajaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nobbler|nobbler]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nobbler|nobbler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shajaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæjæbæth|shæjæbæth]] || [[word:shæjæbæj|shæjæbæj]] || [[word:shæjæbæsh|shæjæbæsh]] || [[word:shæjæbæ|shæjæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shajajabath|shajajabath]] || [[word:shajajabaj|shajajabaj]] || [[word:shajajabash|shajajabash]] || [[word:shajajaba|shajajaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shajabath|shajabath]] || [[word:shajabaj|shajabaj]] || [[word:shajabash|shajabash]] || [[word:shajaba|shajaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shajafbath|shajafbath]] || [[word:shajafbaj|shajafbaj]] || [[word:shajafbash|shajafbash]] || [[word:shajafbaf|shajafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shajabatha|shajabatha]] || [[word:shajabaja|shajabaja]] || [[word:shajabasha|shajabasha]] || [[word:shajabaka|shajabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shajabath|shajabath]] || [[word:shajabaj|shajabaj]] || [[word:shajabash|shajabash]] || [[word:shajaba|shajaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shajabathal|shajabathal]] || [[word:shajabajal|shajabajal]] || [[word:shajabashal|shajabashal]] || [[word:shajabakal|shajabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shajabathatha|shajabathatha]] || [[word:shajabajaja|shajabajaja]] || [[word:shajabashasha|shajabashasha]] || [[word:shajabaka|shajabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shajabathan|shajabathan]] || [[word:shajabajan|shajabajan]] || [[word:shajabashan|shajabashan]] || [[word:shajabakan|shajabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shajabathaoro|shajabathaoro]] || [[word:shajabajaoro|shajabajaoro]] || [[word:shajabashaoro|shajabashaoro]] || [[word:shajabakaoro|shajabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
